---
title: "Locked in on nothing"
description: "While the frontier labs converge on agent-plus-connectors-plus-discovery, the fundable play is the neutral layer: neutral agent, portable memory, portable tools, and now portable identity."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [research-agents]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Strategy / position.**
:::

**Thesis.** While the frontier labs converge on agent-plus-connectors-plus-discovery, the fundable play is the neutral layer: neutral agent, portable memory, portable tools, and now portable identity.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Vendor-Neutral-Positioning.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
